title: Delicate Australian Lime Bowl
description: A cozy Australian dish featuring unwaxed lime and a soffritto base, served in a scallop shell, with a balance of bitter and juicy flavors.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, grated carrot, and chopped celery, and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the lime juice, salt, and black pepper.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the soffritto base for 10 minutes.
Arrange the scallop shells on a baking sheet and fill each shell with the soffritto base.
Bake the filled shells in the preheated oven for 5 minutes.
Remove the shells from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the Delicate Australian Lime Bowls warm, garnished with additional lime juice if desired.
